name: Nitya Narasimhan, PhD
headline: From Ubiquitous Systems to AI Advocacy
bio: I am a systems researcher, a developer advocate, a visual storyteller, and a community builder in New York. Over 25+ years in tech, I've earned 14 patents, published 30+ papers, delivered 100+ talks and created workshops, sketchnotes and curricula with millions of views. The connecting tissue? I like to help people make sense of emergent technologies in ways that transform awareness into applied learning and actionable outcomes. How can I help you build better — with AI?
